requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Solomon Islands BESS Project Acceptance, and Tropical Environmental Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为所罗门群岛BESS项目验收的国际基准及热带环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為索羅門群島BESS項目驗收的國際基準及熱帶環境降額

summary.en: The Solomon Islands does not have a functioning national standards body with mandatory BESS product safety regulations. The Solomon Islands Bureau of Standards (SIBS) exists nominally but has limited operational capacity and has not published mandatory BESS-specific product safety technical regulations as of the dataset date — this should be verified directly before shipment. In the absence of a national mandatory certification regime, the operative technical gatekeepers for BESS safety are: (a) Solomon Power / SIEA project-level technical requirements; and (b) international donor agency specifications (World Bank, ADB, Green Climate Fund, EU, JICA, SPC). Both categories reference IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) as the expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules in Pacific island BESS projects. IEC 62933-5-1 is also referenced at system level. Additionally, the Solomon Islands' tropical climate — characterised by high ambient temperatures (typically 27–32°C), very high relative humidity (80–90%+ year-round), cyclone exposure (Category 4–5 risk), salt-mist corrosion in coastal areas, and dust from laterite roads — imposes significant environmental derating requirements beyond what Chinese standard specifications typically address. BESS containers and enclosures require minimum IP54 or higher ingress protection, anti-corrosion surface treatment, and thermal management designed for ambient temperatures above Chinese standard test conditions.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛尚无具有BESS产品安全强制法规的正常运作国家标准机构。所罗门群岛标准局（SIBS）名义上存在，但运营能力有限，截至本数据集日期尚未发布BESS专属强制产品安全技术法规——出货前应直接核实。在缺乏国家强制认证制度的情况下，BESS安全的实际技术把关方为：（a）Solomon Power / SIEA项目级技术要求；（b）国际捐助机构规格（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、绿色气候基金、欧盟、JICA、SPC）。两类要求均将IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为太平洋岛国BESS项目中锂BESS电芯和模组的预期安全标准。IEC 62933-5-1也在系统层面被引用。此外，所罗门群岛的热带气候——以高环境温度（通常27–32°C）、极高相对湿度（全年80–90%以上）、飓风暴露（四至五级风险）、沿海地区盐雾腐蚀及红土道路扬尘为特征——要求的环境降额远超中国标准规格通常所涵盖的范围。BESS集装箱和外壳须达到最低IP54或更高防护等级、防腐表面处理，以及针对高于中国标准测试条件的环境温度设计的热管理方案。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島尚無具有BESS產品安全強制法規的正常運作國家標準機構。索羅門群島標準局（SIBS）名義上存在，但運營能力有限，截至本數據集日期尚未發布BESS專屬強制產品安全技術法規——出貨前應直接核實。在缺乏國家強制認證制度的情況下，BESS安全的實際技術把關方為：（a）Solomon Power / SIEA項目級技術要求；（b）國際捐助機構規格（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、綠色氣候基金、歐盟、JICA、SPC）。兩類要求均將IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為太平洋島國BESS項目中鋰BESS電芯和模組的預期安全標準。IEC 62933-5-1也在系統層面被引用。此外，索羅門群島的熱帶氣候——以高環境溫度（通常27–32°C）、極高相對濕度（全年80–90%以上）、颶風暴露（四至五級風險）、沿海地區鹽霧腐蝕及紅土道路揚塵為特徵——要求的環境降額遠超中國標準規格通常所涵蓋的範圍。BESS集裝箱和外殼須達到最低IP54或更高防護等級、防腐表面處理，以及針對高於中國標準測試條件的環境溫度設計的熱管理方案。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Solomon Islands project specifications and donor requirements)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in internationally funded Pacific project specifications)

IEC 63056 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems (additional reference where applicable)

Solomon Islands Bureau of Standards (SIBS) — limited operational capacity; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific product safety technical regulation as of dataset date — verify directly before shipment
Solomon Power / SIEA — project-level technical requirements; IEC 62619 evidence expected in project specifications

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements of Traction Battery) which was extended to cover some EES cell formats, alongside GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) which becomes the main mandatory BESS cell safety standard effective August 1, 2025. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. For utility-scale systems, GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management Systems of Electric Energy Storage Systems for Power Stations) governs BMS requirements. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Solomon Islands project specifications or donor-funded project requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），成为100 kWh以上BESS电池的主要强制性安全标准。此前强制性标准GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）已扩展覆盖部分EES电芯规格。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。对于公用事业规模系统，GB/T 34131-2017（电力储能用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）规范BMS要求。上述中国标准不被所罗门群岛项目规格或捐助方资助项目要求接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），成為100 kWh以上BESS電池的主要強制性安全標準。此前強制性標準GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）已擴展覆蓋部分EES電芯規格。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。對於公用事業規模系統，GB/T 34131-2017（電力儲能用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）規範BMS要求。上述中國標準不被索羅門群島項目規格或捐助方資助項目要求接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements of Traction Battery; mandatory, with some EES applicability)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management Systems of Electric Energy Storage Systems for Power Stations; voluntary)

gap.en: Critical gap: Solomon Islands project owners, Solomon Power / SIEA, and international donor agencies (World Bank, ADB, GCF, EU, JICA, SPC) reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules in Pacific island projects. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB 38031-2020, and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or donor procurement rules. Additionally, tropical environmental derating is a Solomon Islands-specific gap not addressed in Chinese standard specifications: (a) IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are required for cells and modules; (b) BESS enclosures must meet IP54 minimum (IP65 or higher recommended for cyclone-exposed and coastal sites) and anti-corrosion surface treatment rated for tropical marine environments; (c) thermal management systems must be validated for continuous operation at 32°C+ ambient with 80–90% relative humidity; (d) structural design should account for cyclone wind loading per Pacific engineering practice; (e) verify SIBS scope directly — no mandatory product certification obligation for BESS has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date, but this may change with new donor-driven regulatory development.
gap.zh: 关键差距：所罗门群岛项目业主、Solomon Power / SIEA及国际捐助机构（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、GCF、欧盟、JICA、SPC）将IEC 62619作为太平洋岛国项目中BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或捐助方采购规则接受为替代依据。此外，热带环境降额是中国标准规格未涵盖的所罗门群岛专属差距：（a）须从ILAC认可实验室取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（b）BESS外壳须达到最低IP54（飓风暴露和沿海站点推荐IP65或更高）及适用于热带海洋环境的防腐表面处理；（c）热管理系统须验证在32°C以上环境温度和80–90%相对湿度下的持续运行性能；（d）结构设计须按照太平洋工程实践考虑飓风风荷载；（e）直接核实SIBS范围——截至本数据集日期尚未从官方来源确认针对BESS的强制产品认证义务，但随着捐助方推动的监管发展，情况可能发生变化。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：索羅門群島項目業主、Solomon Power / SIEA及國際捐助機構（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、GCF、歐盟、JICA、SPC）將IEC 62619作為太平洋島國項目中BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024、GB 38031-2020和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或捐助方採購規則接受為替代依據。此外，熱帶環境降額是中國標準規格未涵蓋的索羅門群島專屬差距：（a）須從ILAC認可實驗室取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（b）BESS外殼須達到最低IP54（颶風暴露和沿海站點推薦IP65或更高）及適用於熱帶海洋環境的防腐表面處理；（c）熱管理系統須驗證在32°C以上環境溫度和80–90%相對濕度下的持續運行性能；（d）結構設計須按照太平洋工程實踐考慮颶風風荷載；（e）直接核實SIBS範圍——截至本數據集日期尚未從官方來源確認針對BESS的強制產品認證義務，但隨著捐助方推動的監管發展，情況可能發生變化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where Solomon Power / SIEA or donor-funded project specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; SIBS mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with SIBS and Solomon Power / SIEA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells, effective August 1, 2025; GB 38031-2020 is mandatory for traction batteries with EES applicability; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for the Solomon Islands as of the dataset date — the Solomon Islands Bureau of Standards (SIBS) has limited operational capacity and no confirmed BESS-specific mandatory Technical Regulation. However, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Solomon Islands project specifications and donor-funded project requirements (World Bank, ADB, GCF, EU, JICA, SPC). Chinese GB standard certification alone is not sufficient for Solomon Islands project acceptance. Additionally, tropical derating requirements — IP54+ ingress protection, anti-corrosion surface treatment, thermal management for 32°C+ ambient and 90%+ humidity, and cyclone-rated structural design — must be addressed beyond standard Chinese specification baselines. Verify SIBS current scope, confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with Solomon Power / SIEA and any applicable donor agency, and engage a Pacific-region engineer with tropical BESS site experience before procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，所罗门群岛尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规——所罗门群岛标准局（SIBS）运营能力有限，尚无经确认的BESS专属强制技术法规。然而，IEC 62619是所罗门群岛项目规格和捐助方资助项目要求（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、GCF、欧盟、JICA、SPC）中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB标准认证不足以满足所罗门群岛项目验收要求。此外，须在中国标准规格基础之上满足热带降额要求——IP54以上防护等级、防腐表面处理、适用于32°C以上环境温度和90%以上湿度的热管理，以及飓风等级结构设计。采购最终确定前，请核实SIBS现行范围，向Solomon Power / SIEA及任何适用捐助机构确认IEC 62619证据要求，并聘请具有热带BESS站点经验的太平洋地区工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，索羅門群島尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規——索羅門群島標準局（SIBS）運營能力有限，尚無經確認的BESS專屬強制技術法規。然而，IEC 62619是索羅門群島項目規格和捐助方資助項目要求（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、GCF、歐盟、JICA、SPC）中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB標準認證不足以滿足索羅門群島項目驗收要求。此外，須在中國標準規格基礎之上滿足熱帶降額要求——IP54以上防護等級、防腐表面處理、適用於32°C以上環境溫度和90%以上濕度的熱管理，以及颶風等級結構設計。採購最終確定前，請核實SIBS現行範圍，向Solomon Power / SIEA及任何適用捐助機構確認IEC 62619證據要求，並聘請具有熱帶BESS站點經驗的太平洋地區工程師。
